version_description: This version matches the studio recording tuning with easy chords by using the capo.

versions.version_description: 80's pop dance feel. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes. Solo plays as verse. Interlude is an interesting change from the chorus so I left it as one large section. Outro returns to the familiar chorus figure repeating to fade.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up When September Ends

content:
[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  (x3)

[Verse]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                      [ch]A[/ch]
You've got style, that's what all the girls say[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
Satin sheets and luxuries so fine[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]A[/ch]
All your suits are custom made in London[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]F#7[/ch]
But I've got something that you'll really like[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Gonna dress you up in my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
All over, all over[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Gonna dress you up in my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
All over your body[/tab]

[Verse]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
Feel the silky touch of my caresses[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]A[/ch]
They will keep you looking so brand new[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
Let me cover you with velvet kisses[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]F#7[/ch]
I'll create a look that's made for you[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Gonna dress you up in my love[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Gonna dress you up in my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
All over your body[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Gonna dress you up in my love, in my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
All over your body, all over your body[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
(Gonna dress you up in my love), in my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
All over, all over, from your head down to your toe[/tab]

[Solo]

[ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F#7[/ch]
